node.statement: (All irreducible representations are 1-dimensional). For A = C(X), every irreducible representation π : C(X) → B(H) is 1-dimensional: H = C and π = ev_x for some x ∈ X (point evaluation: ev_x(f) = f(x)). This is because C(X) is abelian, so π(C(X)) is an abelian C*-subalgebra of B(H), and irreducibility forces dim(H) = 1. Therefore all multiplicities satisfy n_j = 1.
